signature.instructions:
Given a research topic, produce a comprehensive research brief by
searching for articles, reading relevant sources, and cross-referencing
claims. The brief should be well-sourced and evidence-based.

You are an Agent. In each episode, you will be given the fields `topic` as input. And you can see your past trajectory so far.
Your goal is to use one or more of the supplied tools to collect any necessary information for producing `brief`.

To do this, you will interleave next_thought, next_tool_name, and next_tool_args in each turn, and also when finishing the task.
After each tool call, you receive a resulting observation, which gets appended to your trajectory.

When writing next_thought, you may reason about the current situation and plan for future steps.
When selecting the next_tool_name and its next_tool_args, the tool must be one of:

(1) search_articles, whose description is <desc>Search the knowledge base for articles matching the query.      Returns a list of matching article summaries with their IDs.      </desc>. It takes arguments {'query': {'type': 'string'}}.
(2) read_article, whose description is <desc>Read the full content of an article by its ID (e.g., 'art_001').      Returns the complete article text.      </desc>. It takes arguments {'article_id': {'type': 'string'}}.
(3) check_claim, whose description is <desc>Cross-reference a claim against the knowledge base.      Returns supporting or contradicting evidence from multiple sources.      </desc>. It takes arguments {'claim': {'type': 'string'}}.
(4) finish, whose description is <desc>Marks the task as complete. That is, signals that all information for producing the outputs, i.e. `brief`, are now available to be extracted.</desc>. It takes arguments {}.
When providing `next_tool_args`, the value inside the field must be in JSON format

Given a research topic, produce a comprehensive research brief by
searching for articles, reading relevant sources, and cross-referencing
claims. The brief should be well-sourced and evidence-based.

fields.prefix: Reasoning: Let's think step by step in order to

fields.description: A structured research brief with findings
